title: 📈 Wall Street Brief | 2026-05-31
headline: Futures dip as DeepSeek AI rout deepens; Micron overbought after rally; Iran war ceasefire hopes cap oil gains.

Pre-Market Signals.title: U.S. Stock Futures Lower
Pre-Market Signals.summary: S&P 500 futures down 0.3%, Nasdaq futures down 0.8% as AI selloff continues from DeepSeek shock.

Pre-Market Signals.title: Bond Yields Drop
Pre-Market Signals.summary: 10-year Treasury yield falls to 4.12% on safe-haven demand amid geopolitical uncertainty.

Pre-Market Signals.title: Oil Steady on Iran Ceasefire Hopes
Pre-Market Signals.summary: WTI crude near $78/bbl as market weighs potential return of Iranian supply but doubts full recovery.

Sector Rotation.title: Tech Selloff Deepens on DeepSeek Fears
Sector Rotation.summary: Nasdaq leads declines as AI infrastructure stocks fall double-digits; Nvidia down 16%.

Sector Rotation.title: Safe Havens Gain
Sector Rotation.summary: Japanese yen and Swiss franc strengthen vs. dollar as investors flee risk.

Sector Rotation.title: Gold and Silver Slide
Sector Rotation.summary: Gold settles 1.4% lower, silver down 2.5% as dollar strength weighs.

Earnings & Key Stocks.title: Micron Overbought After Rally
Earnings & Key Stocks.summary: Micron flagged as one of the most overbought stocks after this week's rally to new highs.

Earnings & Key Stocks.title: Ferrari EV Launch Backlash
Earnings & Key Stocks.summary: Ferrari's first EV 'Luce' faces heavy criticism; stock tumbled on launch.

Earnings & Key Stocks.title: Universal Rejects Ackman Bid
Earnings & Key Stocks.summary: Universal Music Group rejects Bill Ackman's Pershing Square takeover bid, calling it undervalued.

半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.title: Nvidia Plunges 16% on DeepSeek AI Fears
半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.summary: Nvidia leads AI rout as China's DeepSeek model sparks concerns over U.S. AI dominance; Broadcom also hit hard.

半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.title: Micron Overbought After Rally
半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.summary: Micron flagged as overbought after this week's rally to new highs; potential pullback risk.

半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.title: Mistral to Explore Designing Own Chips
半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.summary: French AI startup Mistral plans to design its own chips, ramping up infrastructure build.

半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
半导体观察 Semiconductor Watch.summary: WSJ argues panic over DeepSeek is overblown; U.S. AI leaders still have competitive advantages.

Macro & Policy.title: Iran War Ceasefire Hopes
Macro & Policy.summary: Oil exports through Strait of Hormuz may not return to pre-war levels; inequality concerns rise.

Macro & Policy.title: Japan Seeks Dialog, Rejects 'Neo-Militarism'
Macro & Policy.summary: Defense Minister Koizumi calls for transparency amid regional tensions.

Macro & Policy.title: Trump Asks Supreme Court to Pause TikTok Ban
Macro & Policy.summary: Trump seeks to delay TikTok ban; Supreme Court decision pending.

Macro & Policy.title: China's Humanoid Robot Export Threat
Macro & Policy.summary: China funding humanoid robots to slash factory costs, posing competitive threat.

Risk Radar.title: DeepSeek AI Rout Contagion
Risk Radar.summary: Continued selloff in AI stocks could spread to broader tech; Nvidia down 16%.

Risk Radar.title: Iran War Ceasefire Uncertainty
Risk Radar.summary: Oil supply disruption may persist; true cost of war fueling inflation.

Risk Radar.title: Bear Market Signal Ignored
Risk Radar.summary: Veteran trader warns of 50% decline; double-digit earnings growth may signal late-cycle.

signal_matrix.signal: DeepSeek AI model sparks broad tech selloff, Nvidia -16%
Micron flagged as overbought after rally to new highs
Iran ceasefire hopes cap oil gains; supply may not fully return
Safe-haven currencies yen and franc strengthen on risk-off
Gold and silver fall on dollar strength
Mistral plans to design own chips, intensifying AI competition
Trump asks Supreme Court to pause TikTok ban
China humanoid robot push threatens U.S. manufacturing
